subject: docs(todo): correct synctone-only pattern count (3 -> 2); add TIMER_LEAKS upstream note
body:
Spot-check of glow-props/docs/implementations/ shows HTTPS_PROXY.md
IS present today — my earlier claim that synctone had 3 unique
patterns was wrong. Only KEY_LESSONS and TIMER_LEAKS are truly
synctone-only.

Also recorded the two-pronged TIMER_LEAKS upstream recommendation:
- glow-props CLAUDE.md §Cleanup (lines 73-78) is cosmetic-only; no
  timer/subscription cleanup rule in the preferences layer.
- `hacks` trigger (line 378) flags setTimeout-for-timing-fixes as
  an anti-pattern but does not mandate cleanup hygiene.
- `race` trigger mentions "event leaks" tangentially, but as a
  review lens, not a standards rule.
- No docs/implementations/TIMER_LEAKS.md exists today.

Recommendation parked in TODO: add both the pattern doc and a
"Timer and Subscription Cleanup" bullet-group to CLAUDE.md
§Code Standards, so every downstream fetching from glow-props
inherits the rule.

Tags: documentation, audit, todo, correction, cross-fleet
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
